LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Assassins.descri: 对人类造成的伤害增加 50%
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Assassins.label: 刺客的
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Bloodied.descrip: 角色生命值越低，造成的伤害就越大
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Bloodied.label: 血迹斑斑
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Enraging.label: 激怒
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Explosive.label: 炸药
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Incendiary.label: 燃烧弹
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Instigating.desc: 如果目标生命值满，则造成双倍伤害
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Junkies.descript: 用户每有一个成瘾行为，伤害就会增加 15%
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Junkies.label: 瘾君子的
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Kneecapper.descr: 20% 的几率使目标的所有腿瘫痪。
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Kneecapper.label: 护膝
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Poisoners.descri: 目标中毒持续 10 秒（每秒 3 点中毒伤害）。
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Poisoners.label: 投毒者的
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Powerful.label: 强大的
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Staggering.label: 令人震惊
